knn_xwoba

Modeling xwOBA with KNN in R

library(tidyverse)
── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
✔ forcats   1.0.0     ✔ stringr   1.5.1
✔ ggplot2   3.5.1     ✔ tibble    3.2.1
✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
✔ purrr     1.0.2     
── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
library(tidymodels)
── Attaching packages ────────────────────────────────────── tidymodels 1.2.0 ──
✔ broom        1.0.6     ✔ rsample      1.2.1
✔ dials        1.3.0     ✔ tune         1.2.1
✔ infer        1.0.7     ✔ workflows    1.1.4
✔ modeldata    1.4.0     ✔ workflowsets 1.1.0
✔ parsnip      1.2.1     ✔ yardstick    1.3.2
✔ recipes      1.1.0     
── Conflicts ───────────────────────────────────────── tidymodels_conflicts() ──
✖ scales::discard() masks purrr::discard()
✖ dplyr::filter()   masks stats::filter()
✖ recipes::fixed()  masks stringr::fixed()
✖ dplyr::lag()      masks stats::lag()
✖ yardstick::spec() masks readr::spec()
✖ recipes::step()   masks stats::step()
• Search for functions across packages at https://www.tidymodels.org/find/
library(rsample)
library(class)
library(kknn)
cleaned_data <- readRDS("./Data/statcast2024_cleaned.rds")
cleaned_data <- cleaned_data |>
  select('launch_speed','launch_angle','total_bases') |>
  mutate(total_bases = as.factor(total_bases))

Model spec

knn_spec <- nearest_neighbor() |>
  set_mode("classification") |>
  set_engine(engine = "kknn") |>
  set_args(neighbors = tune())

Variable spec

variable_recipe <- recipe(total_bases ~ ., data = cleaned_data) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

Workflow spec (model + recipe)

knn_workflow <- workflow() |>
  add_recipe(variable_recipe) |>
  add_model(knn_spec)

Using knn_workflow each time, build 20 knn models using a range of K tuning parameters from 1 to 40.

Evaluate each model using 2-fold cross validation based on roc_auc metric

set.seed(253)
knn_models <- knn_workflow |>
  tune_grid(
    grid = grid_regular(neighbors(range = c(1,40)), levels = 20),
    resamples = vfold_cv(cleaned_data, v = 2),
    metrics = metric_set(roc_auc)
  )

Comparing knn models and choosing which one to use

knn_models |>
  collect_metrics()
# A tibble: 20 × 7
   neighbors .metric .estimator  mean     n    std_err .config              
       <int> <chr>   <chr>      <dbl> <int>      <dbl> <chr>                
 1         1 roc_auc hand_till  0.639     2 0.0000215  Preprocessor1_Model01
 2         3 roc_auc hand_till  0.710     2 0.000141   Preprocessor1_Model02
 3         5 roc_auc hand_till  0.737     2 0.000679   Preprocessor1_Model03
 4         7 roc_auc hand_till  0.751     2 0.000271   Preprocessor1_Model04
 5         9 roc_auc hand_till  0.760     2 0.00103    Preprocessor1_Model05
 6        11 roc_auc hand_till  0.766     2 0.0000460  Preprocessor1_Model06
 7        13 roc_auc hand_till  0.771     2 0.000861   Preprocessor1_Model07
 8        15 roc_auc hand_till  0.776     2 0.00133    Preprocessor1_Model08
 9        17 roc_auc hand_till  0.781     2 0.000701   Preprocessor1_Model09
10        19 roc_auc hand_till  0.783     2 0.000322   Preprocessor1_Model10
11        21 roc_auc hand_till  0.785     2 0.000441   Preprocessor1_Model11
12        23 roc_auc hand_till  0.786     2 0.000437   Preprocessor1_Model12
13        25 roc_auc hand_till  0.788     2 0.000108   Preprocessor1_Model13
14        27 roc_auc hand_till  0.788     2 0.0000598  Preprocessor1_Model14
15        29 roc_auc hand_till  0.790     2 0.000251   Preprocessor1_Model15
16        31 roc_auc hand_till  0.791     2 0.000225   Preprocessor1_Model16
17        33 roc_auc hand_till  0.792     2 0.00000156 Preprocessor1_Model17
18        35 roc_auc hand_till  0.792     2 0.0000799  Preprocessor1_Model18
19        37 roc_auc hand_till  0.793     2 0.000244   Preprocessor1_Model19
20        40 roc_auc hand_till  0.795     2 0.0000262  Preprocessor1_Model20

Plotting the different models

knn_models |>
  autoplot()

Finding the best k

best_k <- knn_models |>
  select_best(metric = "roc_auc")
best_k
# A tibble: 1 × 2
  neighbors .config              
      <int> <chr>                
1        40 Preprocessor1_Model20

Getting accuracy for the model with the best k-value

knn_models |>
  collect_metrics() |>
  filter(neighbors == best_k$neighbors)
# A tibble: 1 × 7
  neighbors .metric .estimator  mean     n   std_err .config              
      <int> <chr>   <chr>      <dbl> <int>     <dbl> <chr>                
1        40 roc_auc hand_till  0.795     2 0.0000262 Preprocessor1_Model20

Fitting model with the best k-value

final_knn <- knn_workflow |>
  finalize_workflow(parameters = best_k) |>
  fit(data = cleaned_data)

Using fitted model to create classification predictions for total_bases based on launch_angle and launch_speed.

cleaned_data_predictions_prob <- final_knn |>
  predict(new_data = cleaned_data, type = "prob")

Creating a best prediction column that find the highest probability classification for every event based on the model’s predictions.

comparison <- cbind(cleaned_data$total_bases, cleaned_data_predictions_prob)
comparison_best_results <- comparison |>
  mutate(best_prediction = case_when(
    .pred_0 == pmax(.pred_0, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3, .pred_4) ~ 0,
    .pred_1 == pmax(.pred_0, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3, .pred_4) ~ 1,
    .pred_2 == pmax(.pred_0, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3, .pred_4) ~ 2,
    .pred_3 == pmax(.pred_0, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3, .pred_4) ~ 3,
    .pred_4 == pmax(.pred_0, .pred_1, .pred_2, .pred_3, .pred_4) ~ 4
  ))

Creating a match column where a 1 indicates that the best_prediction of the model and the real value are the same and 0 is where they do not match.

accuracy <- comparison_best_results |>
  mutate(match = case_when(
    `cleaned_data$total_bases` == best_prediction ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ 0
  ))
accuracy
